metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — NV
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for high-veteran-population counties.

notes.tax_rate_format: Rate per $100 of assessed value unless otherwise noted.
notes.scope: Initial release covers counties with major military installations from states in state-benefits.json.
notes.update_cycle: Tax rates typically set annually by county boards.

disabled_veteran_exemption.eligibility: Wartime veteran with 60%+ service-connected disability; NV resident
disabled_veteran_exemption._note: NV does NOT offer full exemption. Maximum is $25,000 off assessed value.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 60%+ permanent service-connected disability; honorable discharge; NV resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.applies_to: Primary residence, manufactured home, or vehicle registration
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: NV does not offer full exemption. At 100% rating: $35,400 assessed value deduction (FY2025/2026, CPI-indexed). For Clark County median home (~$385,000) at 1.0% effective rate: ~$354/yr savings.
